note: Views Accordion is a single Views style/format plugin with no admin form, permissions, or services. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe documented facts (the style id/format, first-field-as-header, Fields row requirement, jquery_ui_accordion dependency, one-open-at-a-time, key options) an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want a view's results shown as a jQuery UI accordion. Which Views setting/plugin do I choose to do this?
evals.expected_output: Set the view's Format/Style to the 'jQuery UI accordion' style plugin (id views_accordion) provided by the Views Accordion module.

evals.prompt: Using the Views Accordion style, which field of each row becomes the clickable accordion header/trigger?
evals.expected_output: The first field (first non-excluded field in order of appearance) of each row is used as the accordion header/trigger; the remaining fields form the panel.

evals.prompt: My view fails validation with the Views Accordion style. What row style does the view need, and how many fields at minimum?
evals.expected_output: The row style must be set to Fields (the style errors 'requires Fields as row style'), and you need at least two fields so the header and panel are distinct.

evals.prompt: Which contrib module must be installed for Views Accordion to work, since it supplies the jQuery UI Accordion library?
evals.expected_output: The jquery_ui_accordion contrib module (drupal/jquery_ui_accordion ^2.0), alongside core views, provides the jQuery UI Accordion library.

evals.prompt: With the Views Accordion style, can more than one section be open at once, and which option lets all sections be closed at the same time?
evals.expected_output: By default only one section is open at a time (standard jQuery UI accordion); enabling the Collapsible option lets the active section close so all sections can be closed at once.

evals.prompt: In the Views Accordion style options, how do I make a random section open on each page load, and what other values does the 'Row to display opened on start' option accept?
evals.expected_output: Set 'Row to display opened on start' (row-start-open) to 'Random'; it also accepts a specific row number or 'None' (None requires Collapsible enabled).

evals.prompt: Which Views Accordion option prevents the accordion from rendering when the view returns fewer than two results?
evals.expected_output: The 'Disable if only one result' option (disableifone) skips rendering the accordion when there are fewer than 2 results.

evals.prompt: I want to override the HTML markup that the Views Accordion style outputs. Which theme template do I copy and override?
evals.expected_output: Override the views-accordion-view.html.twig template (theme hook views_accordion_view); keep the per-row wrapping div the accordion JS requires.
